items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is an internal work-tracking issue for the **MPG (Management Plane Generator) migration** of the **Azure Purview** SDK (i.e., migrating from Swagger/AutoRest to TypeSpec-based generation under `Azure.ResourceManager.*`).

**Type:** Internal work item / migration tracking
**Author:** MEMBER (@haiyuazhang)
**Service area:** Azure Purview (managed via `sdk/purview/`)
**Parent issue:** #53864

---

<details>
<summary>📋 Suggested Sub-tasks Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Locate the TypeSpec specification for Purview in `azure-rest-api-specs` (under `specification/purview/`)
- [ ] Create or verify `tsp-location.yaml` in the relevant Purview SDK package directory
- [ ] Run TypeSpec code generation locally: `pwsh eng/common/scripts/TypeSpec-Project-Sync.ps1`
- [ ] Build the generated SDK: `dotnet build`
- [ ] Run existing tests: `dotnet test --filter TestCategory!=Live`
- [ ] Export and update public API listings: `pwsh eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 purview`
- [ ] Review breaking changes vs. previously released GA packages (use `ApiCompatVersion`)
- [ ] Apply any needed SDK-side customizations (`Customize/` folder or TypeSpec decorators)
- [ ] Update changelog with migration notes
- [ ] Open a PR for review

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔧 Debugging & Migration Strategies</summary>

- Use the `mpg-sdk-migration` skill for step-by-step migration guidance.
- Use `mitigate-breaking-changes` skill if the generated API differs from the existing GA package.
- Run `pwsh eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 purview` to generate API listing files after regeneration — these must be included in the PR.
- For breaking change mitigation, consider:
  - `[CodeGenSuppress]` / `[CodeGenType]` for suppressing or renaming types
  - `@`@clientName`` in TypeSpec `client.tsp` for renaming
  - `@`@Azure`.ClientGenerator.Core.Legacy.hierarchyBuilding` for base-type changes
- Check `sdk/purview/` for existing customizations to preserve.

</details>

<details>
<summary>📚 Relevant Resources</summary>

- [MPG Migration Skill](.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/)
- [Mitigate Breaking Changes Skill](.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/)
- [Local SDK Workflow Instructions](eng/common/instructions/azsdk-tools/local-sdk-workflow.instructions.md)
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Versioning Guidelines](doc/dev/Versioning.md)

</details>
